title: Ee Maya Peremito
overview: Sri Ramachandra Murthy aka Chandu is a happy-go-lucky ‘rebel’ with no ambition in life. Sheetal Jain is the precious daughter of Pramod Jain. She falls in love with Chandu’s good nature but what happens when her father decides that he needs to change to be worthy of his daughter.
